heading: Transfer tax
label: 5811 Transfer tax
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 5811, acts , ; , , ; , , , consisted of provisions similar to those comprising this section, prior to the general revision of this chapter by .Aug. 16, 1954, ch. 73668A Stat. 722Pub. L. 85–859, title II, § 203(b)72 Stat. 1427Pub. L. 86–478, § 274 Stat. 149Pub. L. 90–618Sept. 2, 1958June 1, 1960

Amendments2025—Subsec. (a). amended subsec. (a) generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “There shall be levied, collected, and paid on firearms transferred a tax at the rate of $200 for each firearm transferred, except, the transfer tax on any firearm classified as any other weapon under section 5845(e) shall be at the rate of $5 for each such firearm transferred.”Pub. L. 119–211976—Subsec. (c). struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary”.Pub. L. 94–455

Effective Date of 2025 AmendmentAmendment by applicable to calendar quarters beginning more than 90 days after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 119–21section 70436(d) of Pub. L. 119–21section 4182 of this titleJuly 4, 2025

Amendments2025—Subsec. (a). amended subsec. (a) generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “There shall be levied, collected, and paid on firearms transferred a tax at the rate of $200 for each firearm transferred, except, the transfer tax on any firearm classified as any other weapon under section 5845(e) shall be at the rate of $5 for each such firearm transferred.”Pub. L. 119–211976—Subsec. (c). struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary”.Pub. L. 94–455

children.text: $200 for each firearm transferred in the case of a machinegun or a destructive device, and
$0 for any firearm transferred which is not described in paragraph (1).

children.heading: By whom paid
children.label: b By whom paid
children.text: The tax imposed by subsection (a) of this section shall be paid by the transferor.

children.heading: Payment
children.label: c Payment
children.text: The tax imposed by subsection (a) of this section shall be payable by the appropriate stamps prescribed for payment by the Secretary.
